nasb.text: But the disciples understood none of these things, and the meaning of this statement was hidden from them, and they did not comprehend the things that were said.

esv.text: But they understood none of these things. This saying was hidden from them, and they did not grasp what was said.

cnv.text: 這些話的含義對門徒是隱藏的。他們聽了，一點也不明白，不知道他說的是甚麼。

ccb.text: 使徒却一点也不明白，因为这番话的含意是隐藏的，他们听不明白。

csbs.text: 但门徒们一点也不领悟这些话。这话对他们是隐藏的，他们不知道他在说什么。
